docs:
# Progress
A fluid progress bar with optional multicolor gradient fill.
## Import
```tsx
import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Progress value={68} gradient content={undefined} side={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **value** (number) — default: `68`: Value
- **gradient** (boolean) — default: `true`: Gradient
- **content** (string): Content
- **side** (string): Side
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add progress
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/progress
```
